General.Name: Sichuan Expressway Co Ltd
General.Description: Sichuan Expressway Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the investment, construction, operation, and management of expressway projects in Sichuan Province, the People's Republic of China. It operates through six segments: Expressway, Construction Services, Transportation Services, Transportation Logistics, New Energy Technologies, and Others. The Expressways segment is involved in the operation of expressways and a high-grade toll bridge. The Construction Services segment engages in the provision of construction and upgrade services under the service concession arrangements and construction contracts. The Transportation Services segment engages in the provision of advertising services; rental of properties and expressways; operation of gas stations and expressways; and sale of oil products. The Transportation Logistics segment is involved in the commodity logistics trade business. The New Energy Technologies segment provides charging services for electric vehicles and sells charger modules. The Others segment is involved in the financial investment. The company was incorporated in 1997 and is based in Chengdu, the People's Republic of China with an additional office in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.

4.Name: Mr. Jiancheng  Yao
